creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/blame/989d921f5d4ac8d8b7c831c13b8954ad1901be24/website/content/en/security/_index.adoc#L64> (migration): 

> Advisories are always signed using the FreeBSD Security Officer link:so_public_key.asc[PGP key] and are archived, along with their associated patches, at the http://security.FreeBSD.org/ web server in the http://security.FreeBSD.org/advisories/[advisories] and http://security.FreeBSD.org/patches/[patches] subdirectories.

From <https://www.freebsd.org/security/>: 

> Advisories are always signed using the FreeBSD Security Officer PGP key 
> and are archived, along with their associated patches, at the 
> http://security.FreeBSD.org/ web server in the advisories and patches 
> subdirectories.

Bug: 

* <http://security.FreeBSD.org/> redirects to 
  <https://www.freebsd.org/security/>

  -- and so, the two subdirectories can not be browsed.
